inputLayer.description: The input vector layer to rasterize.

pixelSize.description: Output raster pixel size (in projection units).

attributeField.description: Optional feature attribute used to burn values. Leave empty to use a fixed burn value.

burnValue.description: Fixed value burned into raster cells when no attribute field is provided.

noDataValue.description: Value assigned to cells not covered by any feature.

outputFileName.description: Output GeoTIFF filename, saved next to the project file.
